creator: alexander@tauruna.ru
text:
Port www/rubygem-passenger require devel/libeio which is broken in current port collection. Error message after running make command:

libeio-4.18.0 is marked as broken: Using master as GH_TAGNAME is invalid.  Must use a version or commit hash so the upstream does not "reroll" as soon as the branch is updated.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/libeio
make
